---
title: "Acknowledgements"
format: html
---

I gratefully acknowledge the support of the Australian Research Council (FT250100337 and DP240102189) and The University of Queensland for this endeavour.

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
![](images/ARC.png){width="70%"}
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](images/UQ-01.png){width="69%"}
:::
:::
